title: iris minutoaurea
intro: Iris minutoaurea, also known as Dwarf Gold Iris, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Iris minutoaurea include relieving symptoms of colds, fever, and bronchitis, as well as reducing inflammation and pain. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a useful addition to homeopathic medicine.
